name: 18V Impact Wrench 3/8"
tagline: Compact 18V impact wrench with 3/8 inch anvil delivering 135 ft-lbs of max torque. Lightweight and ergonomic design ideal for automotive and mechanical applications where portability and precision are essential.
description: Compact 18V impact wrench with 3/8 inch anvil delivering 135 ft-lbs of max torque. Lightweight and ergonomic design ideal for automotive and mechanical applications where portability and precision are essential.
userBenefits: Lightweight 3.8 lb design reduces arm fatigue during overhead and under-vehicle work
3/8" anvil is the ideal size for automotive sensor bolts, small engine work, and motorcycle maintenance
Brushless motor maximizes battery life for a full shift of work on a single charge
Detent pin anvil securely retains sockets during vertical and overhead applications
Compact 5.8 in length accesses tight engine compartments and confined machinery spaces
